name: International Consolidated Uranium Inc.
summary: International Consolidated Uranium Inc. acquires, develops, explores for, and evaluates early stage mineral properties in Canada. It holds an 80% interest in the Mt. Roe gold project comprising two exploration blocks covering an area of approximately 1,235 hectares located in the Pilbara region in Western Australia; and the Dieter Lake property located in North-Central Quebec. The company also holds option agreements to acquire 100% interests in the Mountain Lake uranium property located in Nunavut, Canada; the Moran Lake project located in the Central Mineral Belt of Labrador, Canada; the Ben Lomond and Georgetown uranium projects located in Australia; the Laguna Salada project located in Chubut Province, Argentina; and 70% interest in the Kuulu property covering an area of 4,174 hectares located in the Kavilliq region of Nunavut, Canada. The company was formerly known as NxGold Ltd. and changed its name to International Consolidated Uranium Inc. International Consolidated Uranium Inc. was incorporated in 2004 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
